description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, rectangular footprint, surrounded by landscaped greenery including trees, shrubs, and a fenced backyard. The structure features multiple rooms, visible through a cutaway roof, and includes a large central living area, several bedrooms, bathrooms, and a kitchen. A prominent feature is the backyard swimming pool, bordered by a patio area with outdoor seating and shaded by palm trees. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway leading to a garage, as well as a small entry porch with decorative plants. Windows are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior walls, providing natural light to various rooms. The overall design is modern, with flat and slightly sloped roof sections, and a neutral color palette dominated by white and beige tones.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a backyard pool, landscaped garden, and an attached garage, featuring a flat roof and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the backyard, highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and lush landscaping with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade, showcasing the driveway, garage, entry porch, and front garden with decorative plants.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the bungalow from the opposite side of the backyard, emphasizing the pool area, side garden, and rear windows.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the side, focusing on the pool, patio, and the side garden with a privacy fence and additional greenery.
